stonetop.summary: The bandit-turned-marshal who rules Marshedge through his old gang, the Claws.

system.concept: The bandit-turned-marshal who rules @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge} through his old gang, the Claws.
system.description: A notorious bandit the council of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge} once asked to take the job of marshal. He's still in charge, and his old gang — the Claws — dominate the town watch. A canny operator who would far rather out-think a problem than fight it, and who hides his true strength until the moment it matters.
